title: Unified PRMP Benchmark: 5 Variants × 5 Seeds × 3 Tasks on Amazon & F1
summary: Demo notebook for the Predictive Residual Message Passing (PRMP) benchmark comparing 5 heterogeneous GNN variants (Standard, PRMP, Wide, Auxiliary MLP, Random Frozen) across 3 relational tasks (Amazon review-rating, F1 result-position, F1 result-dnf). The notebook defines all model architectures (HeteroSAGEConv, PRMPConvLayer with predict-subtract-aggregate), generates a synthetic heterogeneous graph mimicking FK-linked tables, trains demo variants with early stopping, then visualizes pre-computed results from 75 full benchmark runs including performance bar charts, prediction scatter plots, Ridge R² embedding diagnostics, and Cohen's d effect size heatmaps. Uses pure PyTorch scatter_mean (no torch_scatter dependency). Mini demo data contains 90 curated examples across 3 datasets plus all statistical analysis metadata.
